newTests.name: Available pet can be purchased and status changes to sold
findByStatus returns a list for status 'pending'
Login page has username and password input fields
findByStatus returns a list for status 'available'
findByStatus returns a list for status 'sold'
Add pet with 'sold' status persists the status
Add pet returns created pet with id, name, and status
Pet can be created, read, updated, and deleted in sequence
Logout after login returns to the login page
New user can register, log in, view profile, and log out
Logout after login clears the session
Valid credentials show the secure area message
Fetching a non-existent pet id returns 404
Login response has expected JSON structure
Fetching an existing pet by id returns the correct record
Invalid credentials show an error message
All pets returned for 'available' have status 'available'
Deleted pet can no longer be found
Login page title is 'The Internet'
Login response JSON contains a session token
Fetching an out-of-range pet id returns a client error
Authenticated user can add and retrieve a pet
Updating a pet's name persists the change
Login sets authenticated state on client
Multiple pets with the same status all appear in findByStatus
Updating a pet's status persists the change
Valid credentials return HTTP 200 with session token
